title: Assembly System
description: A complete building enclosure assembly defined as an ordered layer stack with control-layer continuity tracking. The primary organizing unit of the Construction Assembly Kernel.

system_id.description: Unique identifier for this assembly system.

title.description: Human-readable name for this assembly system.

status.description: Current status of this assembly record.

layer_id.description: Unique identifier for this layer within the assembly.

position.description: Layer position from exterior to interior (1 = outermost).

control_layer_id.description: Control layer function this layer serves. References shared/control_layers.json.

material_ref.description: Reference to a material entry in Construction_Material_Kernel.

attachment_method.description: How this layer is attached (mechanically_attached, fully_adhered, ballasted, etc.).

thickness.description: Layer thickness with units (e.g., '3 inches', '60 mil').

layers.description: Ordered layer stack for this assembly (position 1 = outermost).

control_layer_continuity.description: Map of control_layer_id to continuity status for each control layer this assembly addresses.

interface_zones.description: Interface zone IDs from the shared registry that this assembly encounters.

climate_context.description: Climate conditions this assembly is designed for.

tested_assembly_refs.description: Pointers to tested_assembly_record entries that validate this configuration.

standards_refs.description: Applicable standards by reference ID from the shared standards registry.
